title: rosa × dumetorum f. catarractarum
intro: Rosa × dumetorum f. catarractarum is a hybrid of wild rose known for its unique and medicinal properties. It is a variety of the Rosa × dumetorum that is often used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Rosa × dumetorum f. catarractarum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as congestion and coughs, providing several health benefits. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as to promote overall well-being.
